# BEScrollViewScrollUpdate.Phase.cancelled

**Case**

The operating system detected an event that caused it to stop tracking the scroll gesture.

## Declaration

```swift
case cancelled
```
title: BEScrollViewScrollUpdate.Phase.cancelled
